system:
You are a professional translator. Translate the user's text into clear, faithful English. Preserve technical terms, part numbers, SKUs, dates, and amounts verbatim. Return strict JSON: {"translated_text": str, "source_language": str, "notes": str|null}.

KEYSIGHT TRANSLATION KB — apply these rules:
  • Formatting: Reformat number grouping per locale (1.000,00 in DE/ES, 1,000.00 in EN). Do NOT convert currency unless explicitly requested.
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight Technologies
  • Preserve verbatim: SOA
  • Preserve verbatim: PO
  • Preserve verbatim: Q2O
  • Preserve verbatim: SSD
  • Preserve verbatim: WO
  • Preserve verbatim: ECCN
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR99
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR
  • Preserve verbatim: ITAR
  • Preserve verbatim: A2LA
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 17025
  • Preserve verbatim: Z540.3
  • Preserve verbatim: ANSI/NCSL
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-461
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-810
  • Preserve verbatim: AS9100
  • Preserve verbatim: IATF 16949
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 26262
  • Preserve verbatim: BERT
  • Preserve verbatim: VNA
  • Preserve verbatim: DSO
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(PO|Q|QT|QUOTE|SO|WO|INV|CCC|CC|CR)-[A-Z0-9-]+\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]\\d{4,5}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]{2,4}\\d{2,4}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bN\\d{4}[A-Z]?(-\\d+[A-Z]?)?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bM\\d{4}[A-Z]\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(MXA|EXA|UXA|UXR|FieldFox|InfiniiVision|Truevolt|Trueform|Streamline)\\b
  • Tone: Use formal business register. Spanish: usted form. Japanese: keigo (敬語). German: Sie form. French: vous form.
user:
SOURCE_LANGUAGE_HINT: es
TEXT:

Please include in the order if pricing is in line; otherwise let us know and we will issue a revised PO. This purchase order is issued subject to the buyer's standard terms and conditions of purchase. Acknowledgment of receipt is requested within 2 business days. All shipments must reference the PO Number on packing slips and invoices.- **PO Number:** PO-MERID-COMM-077-Q2 O-73116- **Issue Date:** 2026-05-07- **Requested Ship Date:** 2026-06-04- **Payment Terms:** Net 60- **Quote Reference:** QT-MERID-COMM-077-DE MO- **SKU:** Description | Qty | Unit Price | Extended- **M9384B-04F:** VXG Vector Signal Generator, 44 GHz, 2-channel, 2 GHz modulation BW | 1 | $168,000.00 | $168,000.00- **N9040B-550:** UXA Signal Analyzer, 50 GHz, 510 MHz analysis bandwidth | 1 | $196,000.00 | $196,000.00- **CAL-A2LA-1Y:** Calibration Service - A2LA/ISO 17025 traceable, 1-year | 1 | $1,450.00 | $1,450.00- **85052D:** 3.5 mm Economy Calibration Kit, DC to 26.5 GHZ | 1 | $4,750.00 | $4,750.00- **Subtotal:** $370,200.00- **Tax (0%):** $0.00- **TOTAL:** $370,200.00

Return JSON only.

---**Page 1**
PURCHASE ORDER
MERIDIAN COMUNICACIONES SA
Wireless / 5G/6G · EMEA Operations Procurement & Lab Operations
Procurement contact: see email signature for buyer details.

BILL TO
Meridian Comunicaciones SA
Accounts Payable - EMEA
compras.lab@meridiancomms.es

SHIP TO
Meridian Comunicaciones SA
Receiving Dock - EMEA
Attn: Lab Operations

NOTES
Added a cal kit (85052D) that was not on the original quote. Please include in the order if pricing is in line; otherwise let us know and we will issue a revised PO.
This purchase order is issued subject to the buyer's standard terms and conditions of purchase.
Acknowledgment of receipt is requested within 2 business days.
All shipments must reference the PO Number on packing slips and invoices.

- **PO Number:** PO-MERID-COMM-077-Q2 O-73116
- **Issue Date:** 2026-05-07
- **Requested Ship Date:** 2026-06-04
- **Payment Terms:** Net 60
- **Quote Reference:** QT-MERID-COMM-077-DE MO-

- **SKU:** Description | Qty | Unit Price | Extended
- **M9384B-04F:** VXG Vector Signal Generator, 44 GHz, 2-channel, 2 GHz modulation BW | 1 | $168,000.00 | $168,000.00
- **N9040B-550:** UXA Signal Analyzer, 50 GHz, 510 MHz analysis bandwidth | 1 | $196,000.00 | $196,000.00
- **CAL-A2LA-1Y:** Calibration Service - A2LA/ISO 17025 traceable, 1-year | 1 | $1,450.00 | $1,450.00
- **85052D:** 3.5 mm Economy Calibration Kit, DC to 26.5 GHZ | 1 | $4,750.00 | $4,750.00

- **Subtotal:** $370,200.00
- **Tax (0%):** $0.00
- **TOTAL:** $370,200.00
